portal.title: National GRFM System
login.title: National Grievance Redress & Feedback Mechanism
login.subtitle: Sign in to access services
login.registerSubtitle: Enter your details to create your account
login.passwordRequired: Password update required. Please create a new private password.
login.success: Login successful. Opening your community workspace.
login.forgotMessage: Forgot password support will be handled by the system administrator.
register.title: Create Account
register.noNationalId: I do not have a National ID
register.locationRequired: Please select your province, district, and ward to create an account.
register.success: Account created successfully. Sign in to enter the National GRFM System.
home.welcome: Welcome to the National GRFM System
home.welcomeSubtitle: Submit complaints, provide feedback, track report progress, and access support services.
home.registerComplaintDesc: Report service delivery or programme issues.
home.generalFeedbackDesc: Share an experience, compliment, or suggestion.
home.reportAbuseDesc: Raise urgent abuse, safety, or protection concerns.
home.voiceReportDesc: Record a spoken report from the field.
home.noReportsText: Your submitted complaints and feedback will appear here.
home.learnEarnDesc: Answer awareness questions about social protection programmes and earn points.
workflow.selectProgrammeFirst: Select the programme first so every complaint, abuse report or feedback item can be monitored correctly.
form.name: Name
form.perpetratorNear: Is the alleged perpetrator still near the victim?
form.validationRequired: Please complete all required fields before submitting.
socialRegistry.householdRegistered: Is household registered in the social registry?
location.unsupported: This device or browser does not support location capture.
location.permissionDenied: Location permission was denied. Please allow location so the report can be mapped correctly.
location.timeout: Location capture timed out. Try again near a window or with device location enabled.
location.unavailable: The device could not provide a reliable location.
location.mapHelp: Location will be requested to place this report accurately on the map.
location.requiredForComplaint: Please allow device location so this complaint appears at the correct place on the GRFM map.
location.requiredForAbuse: Please allow device location so this abuse report appears at the correct place on the GRFM map.
voice.languageGuidance: You may record in English, Shona or Ndebele
voice.tellUsHelp: Press the microphone and explain your issue in your preferred language.
voice.tapRedToStop: Tap the red button to stop.
voice.barsRecording: The moving bars show that your voice is being captured.
voice.pressMic: Press the microphone when you are ready to speak.
voice.transcriptHelp: You can confirm or edit this text before submitting.
voice.notAvailable: Voice recording is not available in this browser.
voice.allowMic: Allow microphone access to record a voice report.
voice.recordBeforeSubmit: Record a voice report before submitting.
voice.inlineNotAvailable: Microphone recording is not available in this browser.
voice.inlineAllowMic: Allow microphone access to record audio.
voice.profileLocationMissing: Your profile location is missing. Please contact support before submitting a voice report.
feedback.subtitle: Tell us about your experience with this service.
feedback.deliveryTime: How do you rate the time taken to receive the service?
feedback.staffCommunication: How do you rate communication from the service provider or officer?
feedback.serviceQuality: How do you rate the quality of the service received?
feedback.easeOfAccess: How easy was it to access the service?
feedback.validationRequired: Please complete all survey ratings and required questions before submitting.
feedback.expectedService: Did you receive the service you expected?
feedback.paymentRequested: Were you asked to pay anything to receive this service?
feedback.amountAsked: How much were you asked to pay?
feedback.moreExperience: Tell us more about your experience
success.defaultMessage: Please keep this reference number to track your case.
success.voiceMessage: Your audio report has been captured for review.
success.voiceForwarded: Your report has been forwarded to the relevant district office.
success.feedbackMessage: Thank you for helping improve social protection services.
track.noCasesText: Your submitted complaints and feedback will appear here.
